name: Starter Morals
description: Template prompts for moral judgement and ethical reasoning.

prompts.title: A useful lie
prompts.prompt: If telling a small lie would genuinely make someone feel better and cause no obvious harm, is honesty still the better choice?

prompts.title: Loyalty versus truth
prompts.prompt: A close friend did something wrong, but exposing it would damage their life. Where is the line between loyalty and cowardice?

prompts.title: Public forgiveness
prompts.prompt: Do people deserve a path back after a serious mistake, or are some reputational consequences meant to be permanent?

prompts.title: Good intentions
prompts.prompt: How much should good intentions matter when someone causes real harm while trying to help?

prompts.title: Judging the past
prompts.prompt: When judging people from the past, how much should we account for the morals of their time without excusing what was wrong?
